specs.title: clicking on a belt segment selects it and shows belt panel
clicking on empty cell deselects belt and hides belt panel
selecting a machine hides the belt panel
selecting a belt hides the machine panel
double-clicking on a belt does NOT place a machine or rotate
DEL key when belt is selected removes the belt
belt panel delete button removes the belt
full play-through: tutorial → place machines → belt → program → simulate → score
full play-through: tutorial → place machines → belt → program → simulate → score
full play-through: tutorial → place machines → belt → loop program → simulate → score
full play-through: tutorial → place machines → belts → program → simulate → score
full play-through: no tutorial → place machines with splitter → belts → program → simulate → score
full play-through: no tutorial → place fabricator + assembler + output → belts → program → simulate → score
full play-through: no tutorial → place fabricator + painter + output → belts → program → simulate → score
full play-through: no tutorial → place fabricator + recycler + output → belts → program → simulate → score
full play-through: sandbox — all machines available → place → belt → program → simulate → stop → score
full play-through: multi-machine factory → belts → program → simulate → score
clicking an existing machine shows the properties panel
clicking an empty cell with panel open deselects and hides panel
changing machine type via panel dropdown updates the machine
drag-and-drop moves a machine to a new cell
close button hides the panel
no tool mode buttons exist in toolbar
double-click on empty cell places a part_fabricator
DEL key deletes a selected machine
Delete button in machine panel deletes the machine
machine type can be changed via panel after placement
double-click on existing machine rotates it
app loads without console errors
main menu is visible with title "Robot Factory"
"Start Game" button is visible and clickable
clicking "Start Game" hides menu and shows level select
selecting a level shows toolbar and HUD
canvas container has a canvas element
language toggle changes toolbar text to Czech
"E" key opens and closes the editor panel
toolbar dropdown is removed — no .ui-toolbar-select exists

suites.title: PXT machine dropdown — reflects factory state (empty / add / remove)

specs.title: full lifecycle: empty → add → name shown → remove → empty again

suites.title: PXT machine dropdown — flyout updates when first machine is placed

specs.title: open editor → open Machines flyout → place first machine → flyout blocks show new machine name

suites.title: PXT Block Labels — factory_pick_machine ("machine instance" block)

specs.title: rendered block text contains the word "machine" at most once
"Open Editor" button is visible in toolbar
clicking "Open Editor" opens the editor panel
clicking "Open Editor" again closes the editor panel
"E" key toggles the editor
PXT MakeCode editor loads in the iframe
PXT editor iframe has non-zero dimensions
editor panel is approximately 40% of viewport width
PXT editor contains Blockly workspace inside iframe
PXT editor shows block categories in toolbox
language toggle updates editor button text to Czech
PXT iframe element is present in editor container

suites.title: PXT Event Registration Blocks — hat shape + Events color

specs.title: factory_on_order_received renders as a hat block (no previous/next connections)
factory_on_order_received uses the Events category color (hue ~50)
factory_on_belt_jam renders as a hat block (no previous/next connections)
factory_on_belt_jam uses the Events category color (hue ~50)
factory_on_machine_idle renders as a hat block (no previous/next connections)
factory_on_machine_idle uses the Events category color (hue ~50)

suites.title: Sandbox — Restart clears in-flight items and resets machines

specs.title: Restart wipes belts + machine slots while preserving layout
place machines, program editor, run simulation, verify item production
